title: cyperus croceus
intro: Cyperus croceus, also known as purple papyrus or yellow papyrus, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help treat wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus croceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion, making it a valuable herb for treating various health issues. Cyperus croceus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
